title: The 2026 AI Stack for Real Estate Agents Hour by Hour
description: Five AI tools that handle transcription, lead follow-up, and daily writing tasks. What works, what doesn't, and how to build your stack.
tldr: ChatGPT Plus and Follow Up Boss deliver the most value for real estate agents in 2026. ChatGPT Plus at $20/month handles listing copy, email drafts, and client summaries. Follow Up Boss starts at $69/month for Grow plan and automates lead follow-up with built-in AI features. Claude Pro, Otter.ai, and Spaceflow lack accessible pricing or real estate-specific features.

body.text: AI tools promise to save agents hours each week. Most fail to deliver. We reviewed five products agents ask about in 2026: general-purpose chatbots, transcription services, and CRM automation. Two tools justify their cost. Three remain unproven or opaque on pricing.

We examined vendor pricing pages, feature lists, and public documentation for each product. We did not fabricate test scenarios or invent transaction data. If pricing was unavailable or features unclear, we note that gap. The goal: identify which tools solve real estate-specific problems and which are general-purpose AI with no edge for agents.

ChatGPT Plus unlocks GPT-4, the more capable language model from OpenAI. The $20/month subscription adds faster response times, priority access during peak hours, early feature access, and higher usage limits. Free users get GPT-3.5, which handles most tasks but struggles with nuanced market analysis or lengthy listing descriptions. Plus subscribers also access DALL-E image generation, web browsing for current information, code interpreter for data work, and vision capabilities for analyzing uploaded images.

For real estate agents, ChatGPT Plus excels at writing assistance: listing copy, email sequences, social media posts, and client summaries. The web interface works on any browser. Mobile apps for iOS and Android sync conversations across devices and support voice input. API access exists for developers but follows pay-as-you-go pricing separate from the flat monthly subscription.

body.name: ChatGPT Plus
pros: GPT-4 model produces more accurate, nuanced writing than free tier
Web browsing enables current market research and comps
Mobile app syncs conversations and supports voice input
DALL-E integration for property marketing visuals
cons: No real estate-specific features or templates
Usage limits exist even on Plus tier during peak demand
Requires careful prompt engineering for best results

body.text: Follow Up Boss offers three tiers. Grow plan costs $69/month per user (monthly billing) or $58/month per user (annual billing) and includes lead source connections, Smart Lists for organization, Action Plans for automation, call/text/email from the platform, calendar and email sync, performance reporting, and mobile app. Calling costs an additional $39/user on monthly or $33/user on annual billing. AI features are included but work best with the Calling add-on.

Pro plan costs $499/month for up to 10 users (monthly) or $416/month for 10 users (annual). Additional users cost $49/month or $41/month annually. Pro adds unlimited calling and texting, team inboxes, call reporting, enhanced support and training, personalized onboarding, and full AI features like smart summaries, smart messages, suggested tasks, and predictive lead prioritization.

Platform plan costs $1,000/month for 30 users (monthly) or $833/month for 30 users (annual). Additional users cost $20/month or $17/month annually. Platform adds teams within teams, enhanced onboarding, dedicated success manager, and priority support. All plans include unlimited contacts, lead sources, integrations, free trial, no contract, and 7-day-a-week support.

body.name: Follow Up Boss
body.price: $69/month Grow plan, $499/month Pro for up to 10 users, $1,000/month Platform for 30 users
pros: AI features built into existing CRM workflow, not a separate tool
Smart summaries and suggested tasks reduce manual data entry
Unlimited contacts and lead sources on all plans
cons: Calling feature costs extra on Grow plan ($39-$33/user)
AI features work best with Calling data, creating hidden cost
Pro plan jumps to $499/month for 10 users, steep for small teams

body.text: Claude Pro is Anthropic's subscription offering for its Claude AI assistant. No vendor pricing page was accessible during research. The model competes with GPT-4 on reasoning tasks and offers longer context windows for processing large documents. Without confirmed pricing or feature details, agents should see vendor for current rates and capabilities.

body.name: Claude Pro
pros: Longer context window handles large contracts or documents
Competes with GPT-4 on reasoning and analysis tasks
cons: Limited public information on usage limits or feature set

body.text: Otter.ai provides automated transcription for meetings and voice notes. No vendor pricing page was accessible during research. Transcription tools serve agents who record client calls, team meetings, or property tours and need searchable text. Without confirmed pricing, feature limits, or real estate integrations, agents should see vendor for current details.

body.name: Otter.ai
pros: Automated transcription saves manual note-taking time
Searchable transcripts for client call records
cons: No documented integrations with real estate CRMs
Unclear feature limits or accuracy guarantees

body.text: Spaceflow is listed as an AI tool for real estate agents but no vendor page was reachable during research. Without accessible pricing, feature descriptions, or use case documentation, we cannot evaluate fit for agent workflows. Agents should see vendor for current information.

body.name: Spaceflow
pros: Product exists but insufficient data to confirm benefits
cons: Unclear product category or use case for agents

items: Solo agents writing listing copy daily: ChatGPT Plus at $20/month delivers immediate ROI on GPT-4 access and web browsing for comps.
Small teams managing 50+ leads per agent: Follow Up Boss Grow plan at $69/month (add Calling for $39/month) automates follow-up and surfaces priority leads with AI.
Growing teams with ISAs or 10+ agents: Follow Up Boss Pro at $499/month for 10 users includes unlimited calling, team inboxes, and full AI features without add-on costs.
Agents already using ChatGPT free tier: Upgrade to Plus only if you hit usage limits or need GPT-4 for complex market analysis.
Large brokerages with 30+ agents: Follow Up Boss Platform at $1,000/month for 30 users adds dedicated support and team hierarchy management.
Claude Pro until pricing and real estate use cases are documented publicly. No transparent path to evaluate cost versus ChatGPT Plus.
Otter.ai without confirmed CRM integrations. Transcription alone doesn't justify a separate tool unless it feeds lead data into your workflow automatically.
Spaceflow until vendor provides accessible product information. Insufficient data to recommend for any agent profile.
Follow Up Boss Grow plan without Calling add-on. AI features need call data to deliver value, making the base $69/month incomplete for most agents.
